## How tested

<!-- Commands run, cases covered. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] One commit (squashed) — multi-commit PRs are not accepted
- [ ] `Signed-off-by:` on the commit (DCO)
- [ ] `gofmt`, `go vet`, `golangci-lint run`, `go test ./...` pass
- [ ] User-facing change: entry in `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` + row in
      `FEATURES.md` (and its `BACKLOG.md` line removed, if it came from there)
- [ ] Other docs updated if behavior or interfaces changed
